name: Broco Beans
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb mushrooms (a mix of oyster and regular)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, fry onion and garlic in water until tender.
2. Add mushrooms, vegetable stock, salt, pepper, and sage. Simmer until mushrooms have reduced.
3. Blend broccoli stalks, kidney beans, leeks, and soya milk or tofu together until smooth, adding water if necessary.
4. Stir the blended mixture into the mushroom sauce.
5. Add broccoli florets and any additional water needed for a creamy consistency.
6. Simmer until broccoli florets have softened.
7. Serve over pasta twirls, such as Orgran's Barley and Spinach pasta.
